scripts.generate: tsx src/generate-benchmarks.ts && tsx src/generate-api.ts && tsx src/generate-llms.ts && tsx src/generate-examples.ts && pnpm exec prettier --write 'content/api/**/*.md' 'content/examples/**/*.md' 'content/examples.md' 'content/benchmarks.md' 'public/benchmark-data.json' --log-level silent
scripts.build: pnpm run generate && vite build && tsx src/build-examples.ts
